name: localsearch-extractor-office
title: localsearch-extractor-office
summary: Extractors for some compressed office file formats
description:
Extractors for some compressed office file formats
This package contains the extractors for various compressed
office file formats such as oasis, msoffice-xml and epub.
.
Due to distribution complications of dependent compression libraries,
this feature is available in a separate package. Without this,
indexing of such files will not be supported.
